channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Watch John Glacier Live Out Her 007 Fantasies in New “Bond Girl” Video
item.description: 🔥 Dive into the world of espionage and glamour with @johnglacier's fierce new "Bond Girl" video! 🕵️‍♀️💃 #MusicVideo #JohnGlacier #BondGirl

item.title: Meg Lui Enlists Sufjan Stevens For Debut LP
item.description: 🎶 Meg Lui teams up with indie icon Sufjan Stevens for her highly anticipated debut album! 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #CollaborationGoals

item.title: The Avalanches announce 1st NYC show in 9 years
item.description: Guess who's back, NYC? 🌟 The Avalanches hit the Big Apple after 9 years! 🍎 Let's dance the night away! 💃🕺 #MusicNews

item.title: Gracie Abrams Is Wistfully Reflective on ‘Daughter From Hell’
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the introspective world of Gracie Abrams with 'Daughter From Hell' 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #GracieAbrams

item.title: Rebecca Black announces tour for new LP ‘Age of the Exhibitionist’
item.description: 🌟 Rebecca Black is hitting the road with her new album 'Age of the Exhibitionist'! 🎶 Who's ready for a dance party tour? 💃 #RebeccaBlackTour
